free_text: Levels of 155,157,159,161Tb excited in helium-induced
single-proton- transfer reactions
Thin targets of nearly isotopically pure
Distorted-wave Born-approximation
analysis was used to interpret the reaction results.
The spectroscopic information obtained was compared
to the theoretical predictions of the Nilsson model.
No information on source of uncertainties.
OG
Deuterons were analyzed in the Enge split-
pole spectrograph and recorded in 50 mu-m thick Kodak
NTB emulsions which were covered with aluminium
absorbers.
Tritons were analyzed in the Enge split-pole
spectrograph and recorded in 50 mu-m thick Kodak NTB
emulsions which were covered with 25 mu-m thick
aluminium absorber.
Peak believed to be a multiplet.
